reviews.review_description:
This is a really nicely implemented proof of concept. I was impressed by the challenge of the games, and found it very user friendly.  It does assume that you already know something about music theory, so a complete beginner might be frustrated or confused from the lack of instructions.  For a musician looking to practice their ear training in a fun way, this is a very cool approach.

Would love to see a passthrough/mixed reality option!
